hooks.command:
echo '## EO MicroSaaS OS Active

This project has the EO MicroSaaS OS plugin installed. Available commands:
- /eo - Start or continue your MicroSaaS journey
- /eo-status - Check your progress
- /eo-templates - Get brain templates for manual entry

The navigator skill (eo-os-navigator) will automatically detect your progress and route you to the right step. Quality gates are enforced between phases.'
